# Data Components {#Data}

```{r child = "04_01_Observer.Rmd"}
```

\pagebreak

```{r child = "04_02_Vessel.Rmd"}
```

\pagebreak

```{r child = "04_03_Trip.Rmd"}
```

\pagebreak

```{r child = "04_04_Vessel_Attributes.Rmd"}
```

\pagebreak

```{r child = "04_05_Gear.Rmd"}
```

\pagebreak

```{r child = "04_06_Sets.Rmd"}
```

\pagebreak

```{r child = "04_07_Catches.Rmd"}
```

\pagebreak

```{r child = "04_08_Specimens.Rmd"}
```

\pagebreak

```{r child = "04_09_Tags.Rmd"}
```

\pagebreak

```{r child = "04_10_Activities.Rmd"}
```
